fields.name: aclfile
fields.description:
Path to the ACL file for SAVE/LOAD operations.
If empty, ACL SAVE/LOAD will return an error.

fields.name: log_max_len
fields.description: Maximum number of entries in the ACL LOG.

fields.name: bind
fields.description: Bind address for the admin HTTP server.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether the admin API is enabled.

fields.name: port
fields.description: Port for the admin HTTP server.

fields.name: max_blocked_connections
fields.description: Maximum total blocked connections (0 = unlimited).

fields.name: max_waiters_per_key
fields.description: Maximum waiters per key (0 = unlimited).

fields.name: auto_failover
fields.description:
Enable automatic failover when a primary fails (default: false).
When enabled, the leader will automatically promote a replica to primary
if the primary becomes unreachable.

fields.name: client_addr
fields.description:
Address for client connections (host:port).
Defaults to server.bind:server.port if not specified.

fields.name: cluster_bus_addr
fields.description:
Address for cluster bus (Raft) communication.
Typically server port + 10000 (e.g., 16379 for 6379).

fields.name: connect_timeout_ms
fields.description: Connection timeout for cluster bus in milliseconds.

fields.name: data_dir
fields.description: Directory for storing cluster state (Raft logs, snapshots).

fields.name: election_timeout_ms
fields.description:
Election timeout in milliseconds.
A leader must receive heartbeats within this time or election starts.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether cluster mode is enabled.

fields.name: fail_threshold
fields.description: Number of consecutive failures before marking a node as FAIL (default: 5).

fields.name: heartbeat_interval_ms
fields.description:
Heartbeat interval in milliseconds.
Leader sends heartbeats at this interval.

fields.name: initial_nodes
fields.description:
Initial cluster nodes to connect to (for joining existing cluster).
Format: ["host1:port1", "host2:port2"]

fields.name: node_id
fields.description: This node's unique ID (0 = auto-generate from timestamp).

fields.name: replica_priority
fields.description:
Priority for replica promotion during auto-failover (default: 100).
Lower values are preferred. 0 means this replica will never be promoted.

fields.name: request_timeout_ms
fields.description: Request timeout for cluster bus RPCs in milliseconds.

fields.name: self_fence_on_quorum_loss
fields.description:
Reject write commands when this node cannot form a quorum with reachable nodes.
When enabled, writes return CLUSTERDOWN if quorum is lost, preventing
split-brain data divergence. Reads remain available. (default: true)

compat.description: Compatibility configuration for Redis protocol behavior.

fields.name: strict_config
fields.description:
When true, CONFIG GET/SET returns errors for Redis params that FrogDB
treats as no-ops. When false (default), silently accepts them for
compatibility with Redis clients/tools that set these params.

debug_bundle.description:
Debug bundle configuration.

Controls the generation and storage of diagnostic bundles for troubleshooting.

fields.name: bundle_ttl_secs
fields.description: Bundle TTL in seconds before automatic cleanup (default: 1 hour).

fields.name: directory
fields.description: Directory for storing bundles.

fields.name: max_bundles
fields.description: Maximum number of bundles to retain.

fields.name: max_slowlog_entries
fields.description: Maximum slowlog entries to include in bundles.

fields.name: max_trace_entries
fields.description: Maximum trace entries to include in bundles.

fields.name: default_period_secs
fields.description: Default period for stats collection in seconds (default: 10).

fields.name: hot_threshold_percent
fields.description: Threshold percentage for "HOT" status (default: 20.0).

fields.name: warm_threshold_percent
fields.description: Threshold percentage for "WARM" status (default: 15.0).

fields.name: max_depth
fields.description: Maximum nesting depth for JSON documents.

fields.name: max_size
fields.description: Maximum size in bytes for JSON documents.

fields.name: startup_test
fields.description: Run intrinsic latency test at startup before accepting connections.

fields.name: startup_test_duration_secs
fields.description: Duration of the startup latency test in seconds.

fields.name: warning_threshold_us
fields.description:
Warning threshold for intrinsic latency in microseconds.
If max latency exceeds this, a warning is logged.

latency_bands.description:
Latency bands configuration for SLO-focused monitoring.

Tracks cumulative request counts in configurable latency buckets,
enabling direct SLO monitoring without external aggregation.

fields.name: bands
fields.description:
Latency band thresholds in milliseconds.
Requests are counted in cumulative buckets (<=1ms, <=5ms, etc.)

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether latency band tracking is enabled.

fields.name: file_path
fields.description:
File path for log output. When set, logs are written to this file
in addition to console output. Use `output = "none"` to disable console.

fields.name: format
fields.description: Log format (pretty, json).

fields.name: level
fields.description: Log level (trace, debug, info, warn, error).

fields.name: output
fields.description: Console output destination.

fields.name: per_request_spans
fields.description:
Enable per-request tracing spans (cmd_read, cmd_execute, cmd_route, etc.).
Disabled by default for production performance (~7% CPU savings).
Enable for debugging or when distributed tracing is needed.

fields.name: rotation
fields.description: Log file rotation settings. Only meaningful when `file_path` is set.

fields.name: doctor_big_key_threshold
fields.description:
Threshold in bytes for MEMORY DOCTOR big key detection.
Keys larger than this will be flagged. Default: 1MB (1048576 bytes).

fields.name: doctor_imbalance_threshold
fields.description:
Threshold for shard memory imbalance detection (coefficient of variation).
Shards with memory CV higher than this will trigger a warning. Default: 25%.

fields.name: doctor_max_big_keys
fields.description:
Maximum number of big keys to report per shard in MEMORY DOCTOR.
Default: 100.

fields.name: lfu_decay_time
fields.description: LFU decay time in minutes - counter decays by 1 every N minutes.

fields.name: lfu_log_factor
fields.description: LFU log factor - higher values make counter increment less likely.

fields.name: maxmemory
fields.description:
Maximum memory limit in bytes. 0 means unlimited.
Can use human-readable formats like "100mb", "1gb" in config files.

fields.name: maxmemory_policy
fields.description:
Eviction policy when maxmemory is reached.
Options: noeviction, volatile-lru, allkeys-lru, volatile-lfu, allkeys-lfu,
         volatile-random, allkeys-random, volatile-ttl

fields.name: maxmemory_samples
fields.description: Number of keys to sample when looking for eviction candidates.

fields.name: bind
fields.description: Bind address for the metrics HTTP server.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether metrics are enabled.

fields.name: otlp_enabled
fields.description: Whether OTLP export is enabled.

fields.name: otlp_endpoint
fields.description: OTLP endpoint URL.

fields.name: otlp_interval_secs
fields.description: OTLP push interval in seconds.

fields.name: port
fields.description: Port for the metrics HTTP server.

fields.name: channel_capacity
fields.description:
Bounded broadcast channel capacity (ring buffer size).
Slow subscribers skip ahead rather than blocking the server.

fields.name: batch_size_threshold_kb
fields.description: Batch size threshold in KB before flushing.

fields.name: batch_timeout_ms
fields.description: Batch timeout in milliseconds before flushing.

fields.name: block_cache_size_mb
fields.description: RocksDB block cache size in MB (default: 256).

fields.name: bloom_filter_bits
fields.description: RocksDB bloom filter bits per key (default: 10). Set to 0 to disable.

fields.name: compaction_rate_limit_mb
fields.description: RocksDB compaction rate limit in MB/s (default: 0 = unlimited).

fields.name: compression
fields.description: Compression type: "none", "snappy", "lz4", "zstd".

fields.name: data_dir
fields.description: Directory for data files.

fields.name: durability_mode
fields.description: Durability mode: "async", "periodic", or "sync".

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether persistence is enabled.

fields.name: max_write_buffer_number
fields.description: Maximum number of RocksDB write buffers (default: 4).

fields.name: sync_interval_ms
fields.description: Sync interval in milliseconds (for periodic mode).

fields.name: wal_failure_policy
fields.description: WAL failure policy: "continue" (default) or "rollback".

fields.name: write_buffer_size_mb
fields.description: RocksDB write buffer size in MB.

fields.name: ack_interval_ms
fields.description: ACK interval - how often replicas send ACKs to primary (milliseconds).

fields.name: connect_timeout_ms
fields.description: Connection timeout for replica connecting to primary (milliseconds).

fields.name: fullresync_cooldown_secs
fields.description: Cooldown seconds after proactive lag disconnect before allowing another.

fields.name: fullsync_max_memory_mb
fields.description:
Maximum memory for full sync buffering (MB).
If exceeded, FULLRESYNC requests will be rejected.

fields.name: fullsync_timeout_secs
fields.description:
Full sync timeout (seconds).
Maximum time to wait for a full sync operation.

fields.name: handshake_timeout_ms
fields.description: Handshake timeout during replication setup (milliseconds).

fields.name: min_replicas_timeout_ms
fields.description:
Timeout for min_replicas_to_write in milliseconds.
If replicas don't acknowledge within this time, the write still succeeds
but returns with fewer acknowledged replicas.

fields.name: min_replicas_to_write
fields.description:
Minimum replicas required to acknowledge writes (for primary role).
If set > 0, writes will wait for this many replicas to acknowledge
before returning success.

fields.name: primary_host
fields.description:
Primary host (for replica role).
When role is "replica", this specifies the primary to connect to.

fields.name: primary_port
fields.description: Primary port (for replica role).

fields.name: reconnect_backoff_initial_ms
fields.description: Reconnection backoff - initial delay (milliseconds).

fields.name: reconnect_backoff_max_ms
fields.description: Reconnection backoff - maximum delay (milliseconds).

fields.name: replica_freshness_timeout_ms
fields.description:
Freshness timeout for replica ACKs (ms).
If no replica ACKs within this window, the primary fences itself.
Should be >= 3x ack_interval_ms to tolerate missed ACKs.

fields.name: replica_write_timeout_ms
fields.description:
Write timeout for streaming to replicas (ms). 0 = disabled.
Forces TCP disconnect when iptables drops packets.

fields.name: replication_lag_threshold_bytes
fields.description: Max replication lag in bytes before proactive disconnect. 0 = disabled.

fields.name: replication_lag_threshold_secs
fields.description: Max replication lag in seconds (since last ACK) before proactive disconnect. 0 = disabled.

fields.name: role
fields.description:
Replication role: "standalone", "primary", or "replica".
- standalone: No replication (default)
- primary: Accept replica connections
- replica: Connect to a primary

fields.name: self_fence_on_replica_loss
fields.description:
Reject writes when primary loses all replica ACK freshness.
Prevents zombie writes during network partitions.

fields.name: split_brain_buffer_max_mb
fields.description: Maximum memory in MB for the split-brain command buffer.

fields.name: split_brain_buffer_size
fields.description: Maximum number of recent commands to buffer for split-brain detection.

fields.name: split_brain_log_enabled
fields.description:
Enable split-brain discarded-writes logging.
When a primary is demoted, divergent writes are logged before resync.

fields.name: state_file
fields.description:
Replication state file path.
Stores replication ID and offset for partial sync recovery.

fields.name: requirepass
fields.description:
Legacy password for the default user (like Redis requirepass).
If set, clients must AUTH with this password before running commands.

fields.name: allow_cross_slot_standalone
fields.description:
Allow cross-slot operations in standalone mode.
When enabled, multi-key commands like MGET/MSET can operate across different
hash slots using scatter-gather. MSETNX always requires same-slot.

fields.name: bind
fields.description: Bind address.

fields.name: max_clients
fields.description:
Maximum number of simultaneous client connections (0 = unlimited).
Admin port connections are exempt from this limit.

fields.name: num_shards
fields.description: Number of shards (0 = auto-detect CPU cores).

fields.name: port
fields.description: Listen port.

fields.name: scatter_gather_timeout_ms
fields.description: Timeout for scatter-gather operations in milliseconds.

fields.name: sorted_set_index
fields.description: Sorted set index backend selection.

fields.name: log_slower_than
fields.description:
Threshold in microseconds. Commands slower than this are logged.
Set to 0 to log all commands, -1 to disable logging.

fields.name: max_arg_len
fields.description: Maximum characters per argument before truncation.

fields.name: max_len
fields.description: Maximum number of entries per shard.

fields.name: max_snapshots
fields.description: Maximum number of snapshots to retain (0 = unlimited).

fields.name: snapshot_dir
fields.description: Directory for storing snapshots.

fields.name: snapshot_interval_secs
fields.description: Interval between automatic snapshots in seconds (0 = disabled).

status.description: Status endpoint configuration for health thresholds.

fields.name: connection_warning_percent
fields.description: Threshold percentage for connection warning (0-100).

fields.name: durability_lag_critical_ms
fields.description: Durability lag critical threshold in milliseconds (default: 30000 = 30 seconds).

fields.name: durability_lag_warning_ms
fields.description: Durability lag warning threshold in milliseconds (default: 5000 = 5 seconds).

fields.name: memory_warning_percent
fields.description: Threshold percentage for memory warning (0-100).

tiered_storage.description:
Tiered storage configuration for two-tier (hot/warm) storage.

When enabled, eviction policies `tiered-lru` and `tiered-lfu` demote values
to a RocksDB warm tier instead of deleting them.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Enable tiered storage. Requires persistence to be enabled.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether distributed tracing is enabled.

fields.name: otlp_endpoint
fields.description: OTLP endpoint for trace export.

fields.name: persistence_spans
fields.description: Enable persistence spans (WAL writes, snapshots).

fields.name: recent_traces_max
fields.description: Maximum number of recent traces to retain for DEBUG TRACING RECENT.

fields.name: sampling_rate
fields.description: Sampling rate (0.0 to 1.0). 1.0 = sample all, 0.1 = sample 10%.

fields.name: scatter_gather_spans
fields.description: Enable scatter-gather operation spans (child spans per shard for MGET/MSET).

fields.name: service_name
fields.description: Service name in traces.

fields.name: shard_spans
fields.description: Enable shard execution spans (spans inside shard workers).

fields.name: lock_acquisition_timeout_ms
fields.description: Timeout for acquiring locks on all shards (ms).

fields.name: max_continuation_lock_ms
fields.description: Maximum time a continuation lock can be held (ms).

fields.name: max_queue_depth
fields.description: Maximum queue depth per shard before rejecting new operations.

fields.name: per_shard_lock_timeout_ms
fields.description: Per-shard lock acquisition timeout (ms).

fields.name: timeout_check_interval_ms
fields.description: Interval for checking/cleaning up expired operations (ms).
